chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 49 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 29.01.2024 Mr. Abdullah Mastoi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for appellant has argued that learned Presiding Officer is trying to force the applicant / complainant to compromise with the respondents / accused. Respondents No.5 and 6 are present, have denied this fact. In any case, learned Counsel for applicant after arguing at some length does not press this application and submits that trial Court may be directed to expedite the trial and decide the matter in accordance with law within a stipulated period. Learned Additional General has agreed to this proposal. Accordingly, this application is disposed of, and the trial Court is directed to expedite the trial, examine the witnesses and decide the case in accordance with law within a period of three months. J U D G E Abdul Basit
